description: A train carrying essential chassis components has been delayed due to weather, impacting the start of the next production shift.

nodes.task_description: Receive the delay notification from the rail carrier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives an alert that shipment #75B is delayed by 12 hours.

nodes.task_description: Assess the impact on the production schedule by checking current inventory levels of the affected parts.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines there is only enough inventory for 2 more hours of production.

nodes.task_description: Notify the production manager and adjust the shift start time to minimize idle labor costs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates the delay and the production schedule is officially updated.
